sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46987" key="h(merodro/mion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμερο-δρόμιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n46987.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">astrological calendar</tr_>, title of work by Pappus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.69</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
